title: TextureFactory
description: AssetFactory implementation that loads PNG, JPG, WebP, AVIF, and other browser-supported raster image formats and produces a GPU-ready Texture instance. MIME type detection is performed automatically from the buffer's magic bytes; pass an explicit `mimeType` to override. Sampler state (wrap, filter, etc.) can be configured via `samplerOptions`.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: AssetFactory implementation that loads PNG, JPG, WebP, AVIF, and other browser-supported raster image formats and produces a GPU-ready Texture instance.
MIME type detection is performed automatically from the buffer's magic bytes; pass an explicit `mimeType` to override. Sampler state (wrap, filter, etc.) can be configured via `samplerOptions`.

members.name: create
members.description: Decodes image bytes and wraps the result in a Texture. Prefers createImageBitmap for a zero-copy GPU-upload path. Falls back to a temporary object URL + element on environments that do not support createImageBitmap.

members.name: createObjectUrl
members.description: Creates an object URL from blob and registers it for automatic cleanup when destroy is called. Prefer this over calling URL.createObjectURL directly inside a factory subclass so the URL is always tracked.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Revokes every object URL that was created via createObjectUrl and clears the internal tracking pool.

members.name: process
members.description: Reads the full response body as an ArrayBuffer for MIME-type detection and blob construction.

members.name: storageName
members.description: Identifier used as the object-store / storage-namespace key when this factory's assets are persisted to a CacheStore.
